claim: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations from evidence agents correctly block PRD readiness in the current implementation.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0, and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED when recommendation is clarify
evidence.why: This is the core blocking logic that prevents PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing data or need clarification

evidence.summary: actionableMissingItems filters out status notes like no missing data identified from missing arrays
evidence.why: This prevents non-actionable status messages from becoming blockers

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem identifies patterns like no missing, all complete, no conflicts as non-missing status notes
evidence.why: This regex-based filtering allows agents to report status without triggering false-positive blockers

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each evidence agent result and accumulates blockers
evidence.why: This integrates the blocking logic into the PRD readiness check

evidence.summary: Test confirms that cross-checker with missing array and clarify recommendation produces prd_ready false with both EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: This is the primary test verifying the blocking behavior works correctly

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready is false and both blocker codes are present in blockers array
evidence.why: This confirms the acceptance criterion that missing and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness

evidence.summary: Test confirms that status notes like No missing data identified and All required evidence tasks completed in missing arrays do not block readiness
evidence.why: This verifies the isNonMissingStatusItem filtering logic prevents false positives

risks: The implementation may not cover all edge cases for status note patterns
Agents might not follow the recommended patterns for status messages in missing arrays
Cross-checker and verifier results might not be present if the evidence policy is not correctly enforced

result.notes: The current implementation correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing data or clarify recommendations. The code and tests confirm the acceptance criterion is met.
